title: Hindaun Fort
tagline: Hindaun Fort — heritage city of Rajasthan

overview.short: Hindaun Fort is a fort in the area of Hindaun in Karauli District of the Indian state of Rajasthan.
overview.description: Hindaun Fort is a fort in the area of Hindaun in Karauli District of the Indian state of Rajasthan. The Fort was built by the Dagur clan of Jats who carved out a principality around Hindaun from the Mughal Empire.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Shri Raghunath Ji Temple
topPlaces.description: Shri Raghunath Ji Temple is a Hindu temple. It is the ancient temple of Hindaun City.

topPlaces.name: Hindaun
topPlaces.description: Hindaun is a city and municipality, near city of Karauli in Karauli district, Rajasthan, India. It has a population of 105690 and is governed by a municipal council.

topPlaces.name: Hindaun Block
topPlaces.description: Hindaun is a block in Karauli district of the Indian state of Rajasthan in Northern India. It is a subdivisional headquarter.

topPlaces.name: Mahu Ibrahimpur
topPlaces.description: Mahu Ibrahimpur is a town in Hindaun Block in Karauli district of the Indian state of Rajasthan in Northern India. The town is located in the vicinity of the Aravalli Range.

topPlaces.name: Jaggar Dam
topPlaces.description: Jaggar Dam is an Earthen dam near Jagar Village of Hindaun City in Hindaun Block, Rajasthan, India. The dam was completed in 1957 for the purpose of irrigation and water supply.

topPlaces.name: Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya, Karauli
topPlaces.description: Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya, Karauli, also known as JNV Jatnagla, is located in Hindaun Tehsil, Karauli district in Rajasthan state of India. Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya Karauli is a schools for talented children and forms a part of Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya group of nationwide government schools.

topPlaces.name: Baragama
topPlaces.description: Baragama is a village in mahaveer Tehsil, Karauli district, Rajasthan, India, and forms a part of Bharatpur Division. It is located 34 km (21 mi) north of the district headquarters at Karauli, 7 km (4.3 mi) from Hindaun and 131 km (81 mi) from the state capital at Jaipur.

items.note: Shri Raghunath Ji Temple is a Hindu temple. It is the ancient temple of Hindaun City.
Hindaun is a city and municipality, near city of Karauli in Karauli district, Rajasthan, India. It has a population of 105690 and is governed by a municipal council.
Hindaun is a block in Karauli district of the Indian state of Rajasthan in Northern India. It is a subdivisional headquarter.
Mahu Ibrahimpur is a town in Hindaun Block in Karauli district of the Indian state of Rajasthan in Northern India. The town is located in the vicinity of the Aravalli Range.
Jaggar Dam is an Earthen dam near Jagar Village of Hindaun City in Hindaun Block, Rajasthan, India. The dam was completed in 1957 for the purpose of irrigation and water supply.

Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya, Karauli, also known as JNV Jatnagla, is located in Hindaun Tehsil, Karauli district in Rajasthan state of India. Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya Karauli is a schools for talented children and forms a part of Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya group of nationwide government schools.

Baragama is a village in mahaveer Tehsil, Karauli district, Rajasthan, India, and forms a part of Bharatpur Division. It is located 34 km (21 mi) north of the district headquarters at Karauli, 7 km (4.3 mi) from Hindaun and 131 km (81 mi) from the state capital at Jaipur.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Hindaun Fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Hindaun Fort is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Hindaun Fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Agra Airport (Pandit Deen Dayal Upadhyay) (103 km) and the nearest railway station is Agra Cantt (106 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Hindaun Fort?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Hindaun Fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Hindaun Fort?
faq.a: Stays in Hindaun Fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Hindaun Fort?
faq.a: The top attractions are Shri Raghunath Ji Temple, Hindaun, Hindaun Block, Mahu Ibrahimpur, Jaggar Dam.
